channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ivan Demidov set for NHL debut with Montreal Canadiens
item.description: MONTREAL (AP) — Ivan Demidov is set to make his anticipated — and sooner-than-expected — NHL debut on Monday night. The 19-year-old Russian forward is expected to take the Bell Centre ice when the Montreal Canadiens host the Chicago Blackhawks with a chance to clinch a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sharks’ Logan Couture set to announce end of his playing career
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks captain Logan Couture and general manager Mike Grier will speak at SAP Center on Tuesday
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Denver Nuggets boss Josh Kroenke says firings of coach and GM were months in the making
item.description: Firing the head coach and general manager with just three games left in the regular season might seem like an impulsive move but Denver Nuggets coach Josh Kroenke said Tuesday the split was months in the making.
item.dc:creator: Arnie Stapleton, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Yankees' Aaron Judge to be US captain at 2026 World Baseball Classic
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Appointed U.S. captain for next year's World Baseball Classic, Aaron Judge will be playing for more than himself and his teammates. “It’s something special getting a chance to represent our country,” the New York Yankees star said after manager Mark DeRosa's announcement Monday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vote now: Bay Area News Group girls athlete of the week
item.description: Make your choice for the top performance among Bay Area girls high school athletes from April 7-12. Performances from the Livermore Stampede, other softball action and track and field included in this week's edition.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Boxing legend George Foreman remembered for his love of family, faith and cheeseburgers
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — George Foreman was remembered Monday in a memorial service in his hometown of Houston for his legendary boxing career as well as for his love of God, family, horses and cheeseburgers and for his desire to help his fellow man. “He preached love all the time.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Limping to finish line, San Jose Sharks recall three players from AHL
item.description: Danil Gushchin, Luca Cagnoni and Jimmy Schuldt brought up as San Jose Sharks face the Vancouver Canucks on Monday night
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: NFL Draft: How to watch, dates, draft order and potential top picks
item.description: Miami standout Cam Ward is widely considered the top quarterback prospect of this year's NFL draft and the favorite to be selected by the Tennessee Titans with the No. 1 overall selection. Not bad for a guy who was largely overlooked by colleges five years ago.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US-based Original Six Red Wings, Rangers, Bruins, Blackhawks eliminated from playoffs for 1st time
item.description: The Original Six teams based in the United States have a rich history, combining to hoist the Stanley Cup 27 times. And now, they share an unwanted distinction. Detroit, Boston, Chicago and the New York Rangers will all miss the playoffs in the same year for the first time in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Phoenix Suns fire coach Mike Budenholzer after one dismal season with high-priced roster
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — The Phoenix Suns have parted ways with veteran coach Mike Budenholzer following one dismal season that featured a fast start before a maddening slide out of postseason contention for a high-priced roster that included Kevin Durant, Devin Booker and Bradley Beal.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kyle Larson and Denny Hamlin renew rivalry at Bristol with their seventh 1-2 finish
item.description: A second consecutive victory at Bristol Motor Speedway was especially sweet for Kyle Larson, and one reason loomed large in his rearview mirror.
item.dc:creator: NATE RYAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: South Carolina guard MiLaysia Fulwiley enters transfer portal, AP source says
item.description: South Carolina guard MiLaysia Fulwiley is officially in the transfer portal, according to a person with access to it. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Monday on condition of anonymity because no official announcement has been made.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kyren Lacy, former LSU star wide receiver and NFL hopeful, dead at 24
item.description: Former LSU star wide receiver Kyren Lacy, 24, has died amid an investigation into a fatal car crash in December. He was found dead in Houston.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: Roars for Rory. The famous sound of Sunday at the Masters Tournament could be for Rory McIlroy (-12) this year.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, WGN 9

item.title: Game 82: The end of the line for some in the NBA, decision day for others
item.description: Game 82 for every team in the NBA has arrived. For 10 clubs, it's the end of the season. For 13 others, it's one last game before the postseason. And for seven teams in the Western Conference, Game 82 might feel like Game 7.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball Hall of Famer Ken Griffey Jr. relishing chance to photograph Masters
item.description: The 55-year-old Griffey, a 13-time All-Star, said he's a late bloomer when it comes to sports photography.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: It's "Moving Day" at the 89th Masters Tournament at Augusta National Golf Club. The term refers to golfers who made the cut trying to get themselves into position on the leader board to win on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Fire face Inter Miami in Eastern Conference action
item.description: Inter Miami CF (4-0-2, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Fire (3-2-2, sixth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 4:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Taylor gets 3 hits as the White Sox stop 8-game slide by routing the Red Sox 11-1
item.description: Michael A. Taylor had three hits and scored three times, and the Chicago White Sox stopped an eight-game slide by routing the sloppy Boston Red Sox 11-1 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: College athletes and San Diego students with disabilities team up for day of sports
item.description: The Inclusive Sports Foundation has provided children with special needs the opportunity to play sports with college athletes and recently stopped by the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Northwestern University to settle lawsuit over football program hazing allegations
item.description: Northwestern University has agreed to settle a lawsuit filed by students against the school and former head coach Pat Fitzgerald, who alleged hazing incidents took place in the football program, but the settlement does not resolve Fitzgerald's lawsuit against the university.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Steele tosses 7 innings as the Cubs pound the Rangers 7-0 on frigid night
item.description: Justin Steele tossed three-hit ball over seven innings, and the Chicago Cubs beat the Texas Rangers 7-0 on a frigid Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9
